concept.description: Derives stable relative source paths for scanned bootstrap, shell, and src files.
concept.cypher: MATCH (root:File:Directory) WHERE root.fileName IN ['bootstrap', 'shell', 'src'] MATCH path = (root)-[:CONTAINS*]->(file:File) WITH file, [segment IN nodes(path) | segment.fileName] AS segments SET file:SaltMarcher:SourcePath, file.relativePath = reduce(relativePath = '', segment IN segments | CASE WHEN relativePath = '' THEN segment ELSE relativePath + '/' + segment END) RETURN file AS SourceFile

concept.description: Labels view root packages as SaltMarcher view components.
concept.cypher: MATCH (componentPackage:Package) WHERE componentPackage.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.[^.]+' SET componentPackage:SaltMarcher:ViewComponent, componentPackage.component = split(componentPackage.fqn, '.')[2] RETURN componentPackage AS ViewComponent

concept.description: Labels direct-reuse view components whose root name ends with shared.
concept.cypher: MATCH (componentPackage:Package:SaltMarcher:ViewComponent) WHERE componentPackage.component ENDS WITH 'shared' SET componentPackage:SharedViewComponent RETURN componentPackage AS SharedViewComponent

concept.description: Labels SaltMarcher MVCI bucket packages below src.view.<component>.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bucketPackage:Package) WHERE bucketPackage.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.[^.]+\\.(Model|View|Controller|interactor|assembly)(\\..*)?' WITH bucketPackage, split(bucketPackage.fqn, '.') AS segments SET bucketPackage:SaltMarcher:MvciBucket, bucketPackage.component = segments[2], bucketPackage.bucket = segments[3] RETURN bucketPackage AS MvciBucket

concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types with component, bucket, and relative source path metadata.
concept.cypher: MATCH (packageNode:Package)-[:CONTAINS]->(type:Java:Type) WHERE packageNode.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.[^.]+(\\..*)?' WITH packageNode, type, split(packageNode.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewType, type.component = segments[2], type.bucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[3] IN ['Model', 'View', 'Controller', 'interactor', 'assembly'] THEN segments[3] ELSE 'ROOT' END, type.relativePath = replace(packageNode.fqn, '.', '/') + '/' + coalesce(type.sourceFileName, type.name + '.java') RETURN type AS ViewType

concept.description: Labels root *ViewContribution entrypoints for each view component.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'ROOT' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'ViewContribution' SET type:SaltMarcher:RootEntrypoint RETURN type AS RootEntrypoint

concept.description: Labels assembly-owned classes and assembly-only naming contracts.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'assembly' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'RuntimeSession' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'ScreenAssembly' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'ShellAdapter' SET type:SaltMarcher:AssemblyClass RETURN type AS AssemblyClass

concept.description: Labels SaltMarcher domain API boundary types.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+API' OR type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.api\\..+' SET type:SaltMarcher:DomainApi RETURN type AS DomainApi

concept.description: Captures interactor dependencies that already point at domain API boundaries.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:DomainApi) WHERE source.bucket = 'interactor' MERGE (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON_DOMAIN_API]->(target) RETURN source AS Interactor, target AS DomainApi

concept.description: Captures view-layer dependencies on JavaFX scene graph types.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE target.fqn STARTS WITH 'javafx.scene.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'javafx.stage.' MERGE (source)-[:USES_SCENE_GRAPH]->(target) RETURN source AS Source, target AS SceneGraphType

constraint.description: Controller darf nur das eigene interactor-Bucket und freigegebene Basistypen sehen.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType {bucket: 'Controller'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source <> target AND ( target.fqn STARTS WITH 'shell.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.domain.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.data.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'javafx.' OR ( target:SaltMarcher:ViewType AND ( target.component <> source.component OR target.bucket <> 'interactor' ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'Controller darf nur eigenes interactor plus Basis-Typen sehen' AS Boundary, 'Controller -> eigenes interactor oder Basis-Typen' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Verschiebe die Abhaengigkeit hinter das eigene interactor-Bucket.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: View darf nur eigenes Model, eigenes Controller und explizite shared-Komponenten sehen.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType {bucket: 'View'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source <> target AND ( target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.domain.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.data.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'shell.' OR ( target:SaltMarcher:ViewType AND NOT ( (target.component = source.component AND target.bucket IN ['Model', 'Controller', 'View']) OR target.component ENDS WITH 'shared' ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'View darf nur eigenes Model, eigenes Controller und shared-Komponenten sehen' AS Boundary, 'View -> eigenes Model/eigenes Controller/eigene View/shared' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Verlege Backend- oder private Fremdkomponenten-Zugriffe aus dem View.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Model darf keine anderen MVCI-Buckets, kein domain, kein data und kein shell sehen.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType {bucket: 'Model'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source <> target AND ( target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.domain.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.data.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'shell.' OR ( target:SaltMarcher:ViewType AND NOT ( target.component = source.component AND target.bucket = 'Model' ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'Model darf keine anderen MVCI-Buckets oder Backend-Schichten sehen' AS Boundary, 'Model -> eigenes Model oder Basis-Typen' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Halte Presentation State frei von View-, Controller-, Interactor- und Backend-Kopplung.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Interactor darf nur eigenes Model, eigenes interactor und Domain-APIs sehen; keine View-, Controller- oder Assembly-Buckets.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType {bucket: 'interactor'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source <> target AND ( target.fqn STARTS WITH 'shell.' OR target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.data.' OR ( target:SaltMarcher:ViewType AND NOT ( target.component = source.component AND target.bucket IN ['Model', 'interactor'] ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'Interactor darf keine View-, Controller-, Assembly-, Shell- oder Data-Abhaengigkeiten haben' AS Boundary, 'Interactor -> eigenes Model/eigenes interactor/domain API/Basis-Typen' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Verschiebe UI- und Wiring-Abhaengigkeiten aus dem interactor.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Interactor darf Domain nur ueber Feature-APIs sehen, nicht ueber Domain-Interna.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType {bucket: 'interactor'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE target.fqn STARTS WITH 'src.domain.' AND NOT target:SaltMarcher:DomainApi RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'Interactor darf Domain nur ueber Feature-APIs sehen' AS Boundary, 'Interactor -> src.domain.<feature>.*API oder src.domain.<feature>.api.*' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Ziehe die Abhaengigkeit auf die Domain-API-Grenze hoch.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Interactor darf keine Scene-Graph-Typen kennen oder exponieren.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType {bucket: 'interactor'})-[:USES_SCENE_GRAPH]->(target:Java:Type) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, target.fqn AS Target, 'Interactor darf keine Scene-Graph-Typen kennen oder exponieren' AS Boundary, 'Interactor -> kein javafx.scene/javafx.stage' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Halte JavaFX Scene-Graph-Typen im View- oder Assembly-Bucket.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Normale Komponenten duerfen keine privaten MVCI-Buckets fremder Komponenten direkt importieren.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType) WHERE source.component <> target.component AND NOT source.component ENDS WITH 'shared' AND NOT target.component ENDS WITH 'shared' AND target.bucket <> 'ROOT' RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, target.relativePath AS Target, 'Normale Komponenten duerfen keine privaten MVCI-Buckets fremder Komponenten sehen' AS Boundary, 'Komponente -> eigene Buckets oder *shared-Komponenten' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Verschiebe Wiederverwendung in eine dedizierte *shared-Komponente.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Unter src/view/<component>/ sind nur die erlaubten MVCI-Buckets und genau ein Root-Entrypoint erlaubt.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (file:File:SaltMarcher:SourcePath) WHERE file.relativePath =~ 'src/view/[^/]+/.+\\.java' AND NOT file.relativePath =~ 'src/view/[^/]+/[^/]+ViewContribution\\.java' AND NOT file.relativePath =~ 'src/view/[^/]+/(Model|View|Controller|interactor|assembly)(/.+)?/[^/]+\\.java' RETURN DISTINCT file.relativePath AS Source, file.relativePath AS Target, 'View-Komponenten duerfen nur MVCI-Buckets und einen Root-Entrypoint enthalten' AS Boundary, 'src/view/<component>/{<Component>ViewContribution.java,Model,View,Controller,interactor,assembly}' AS ExpectedDirection, file.relativePath AS ActualDirection, 'Lege die Datei in einen erlaubten MVCI-Bucket oder in den Root-Entrypoint um.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

MATCH (file:File:SaltMarcher:SourcePath) WHERE file.relativePath STARTS WITH 'src/view/' AND file.fileName =~ '.*(RuntimeSession|ShellAdapter|ScreenAssembly)\\.java' AND NOT file.relativePath CONTAINS '/assembly/' RETURN DISTINCT file.relativePath AS Source, file.relativePath AS Target, '*RuntimeSession, *ShellAdapter und *ScreenAssembly gehoeren in assembly/' AS Boundary, 'src/view/<component>/assembly/**' AS ExpectedDirection, file.relativePath AS ActualDirection, 'Verschiebe den Wiring- oder Session-Typ in das assembly-Bucket.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Jede View-Komponente braucht genau einen Root-Entrypoint im Komponenten-Root.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (file:File:SaltMarcher:SourcePath) WHERE file.relativePath =~ 'src/view/[^/]+/.+\\.java' WITH DISTINCT split(file.relativePath, '/')[2] AS component OPTIONAL MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RootEntrypoint {component: component}) WITH component, count(root) AS rootCount, collect(root.relativePath) AS rootPaths WHERE rootCount <> 1 WITH component, rootCount, reduce(pathList = '', path IN rootPaths | CASE WHEN path IS NULL THEN pathList WHEN pathList = '' THEN path ELSE pathList + ', ' + path END) AS actualRoots RETURN 'src/view/' + component AS Source, CASE WHEN actualRoots = '' THEN '(none)' ELSE actualRoots END AS Target, 'Jede View-Komponente braucht genau einen Root-Entrypoint' AS Boundary, 'genau 1x src/view/<component>/<Component>ViewContribution.java' AS ExpectedDirection, 'count=' + toString(rootCount) AS ActualDirection, 'Lege genau einen Root-Entrypoint im Komponenten-Root an.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: View-Bucket, Paket und Quellpfad muessen fuer kompilierte View-Typen konsistent sein.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (file:File:SaltMarcher:SourcePath) WHERE file.relativePath =~ 'src/view/[^/]+/.+\\.java' WITH file, split(file.relativePath, '/') AS segments WITH file, reduce(expectedPackage = '', index IN range(0, size(segments) - 2) | CASE WHEN expectedPackage = '' THEN segments[index] ELSE expectedPackage + '.' + segments[index] END ) AS expectedPackage OPTIONAL MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewType) WHERE type.sourceFileName = file.fileName AND NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND type.fqn STARTS WITH expectedPackage + '.' WITH file, expectedPackage, collect(type.fqn) AS matchingTypes WHERE size(matchingTypes) = 0 RETURN DISTINCT file.relativePath AS Source, expectedPackage AS Target, 'View-Bucket und Paket muessen mit dem Quellpfad konsistent sein' AS Boundary, 'Quellpfad und Paket muessen denselben src.view-Pfad beschreiben' AS ExpectedDirection, file.relativePath AS ActualDirection, 'Richte Paketdeklaration und Bucket-Pfad aufeinander aus.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
